spec.description: Package exporter dashboard with package inventory, apt cache state, exporter runtime, and Prometheus scrape health.

spec.title: Exporter CPU
spec.description: Exporter CPU usage over time

spec.title: Exporter Memory
spec.description: Exporter resident memory

spec.title: Exporter Heap Detail
spec.description: Go heap allocation, in-use, idle, and released memory

spec.title: Exporter GC Rate
spec.description: Go garbage collection frequency

spec.title: Exporter Scrape Up
spec.description: Prometheus scrape availability

spec.title: Exporter Scrape Duration
spec.description: Prometheus scrape duration

spec.title: Exporter Scrape Samples
spec.description: Prometheus samples after metric relabeling

spec.title: Upgradable Count Changes
spec.description: Number of changes in all upgradable package counts over the last 24 hours

spec.title: Pinned Update Count Changes
spec.description: Number of changes in pinned update counts over the last 24 hours

spec.title: Backports Update Count Changes
spec.description: Number of changes in backports update counts over the last 24 hours

spec.title: Package Collection Duration p95
spec.description: 95th percentile apt/dpkg package collection duration

spec.title: Package Collection Duration Avg
spec.description: Average apt/dpkg package collection duration

spec.title: Package Index Cache Hit Rate
spec.description: Package index cache hits per second

spec.title: Package Index Cache Miss Rate
spec.description: Package index cache misses per second

spec.title: Exporter Goroutines
spec.description: Exporter goroutine count

spec.title: Exporter Open FDs
spec.description: Exporter open file descriptors

spec.title: Exporter Collection Age
spec.description: Seconds since the last successful package collection

spec.title: Exporter Collection Success
spec.description: Last package collection success state

spec.title: Broken Packages
spec.description: Broken packages across selected targets

spec.title: Security Updates
spec.description: Security upgrade candidates selected by apt policy

spec.title: Reboot Required
spec.description: Selected targets with /run/reboot-required present

spec.title: Package Inventory
spec.description: Per-target package state, exporter version, apt cache validity, and source freshness

spec.title: Available Updates
spec.description: Normal upgrade candidates selected by apt policy

spec.title: Installed Packages
spec.description: Total installed packages across selected targets

spec.title: APT Lists Age
spec.description: Seconds since the newest apt lists file was modified

spec.title: DPKG Status Age
spec.description: Seconds since dpkg status database was modified

spec.title: APT Lists Files
spec.description: Apt package index files by compression

spec.title: APT Cache Valid
spec.description: Share of selected targets with usable apt package index cache

spec.title: Collection Stage Duration p95
spec.description: 95th percentile package collection stage duration

spec.title: Collection Stage Duration Avg
spec.description: Average package collection stage duration

spec.expr: sum by (instance, stage) (rate(pkg_exporter_collection_stage_duration_seconds_sum{job=~"$job"}[5m])) / sum by (instance, stage) (rate(pkg_exporter_collection_stage_duration_seconds_count{job=~"$job"}[5m]))

spec.title: Pinned Updates
spec.description: Updates hidden by apt policy, pinning, or held packages

spec.title: Backports Updates
spec.description: Newer package versions available from backports

spec.title: Exporter Collection Duration
spec.description: Average framework collection refresh duration over five minutes

spec.title: Package Exporter Overview

spec.name: job
spec.label: job
spec.description: Prometheus scrape job exposing pkg_exporter metrics
